title: CallLint Evidence Manifest
description: A read-only PROJECTION (calllint.evidence-manifest.v1) of an already-decided Trust Page onto the ADR 0034 evidence discipline — the Decision Receipt's public, tool-portable sibling (same facts, projected). It carries the verdict + authority + completeness + digests VERBATIM and introduces NO new score, verdict vocabulary, or authority model (ADR 0053 §2). The signature attests WHO emitted the projection, never that the artifact is safe; the committed body ships `signature: null` and is signed as a separate, non-deterministic step. See ADR 0053 §2/§5 and docs/new12-integration.md §2.2.

schema.description: Manifest schema identity. Distinct from calllint.trust-page.v0 / calllint.evidence-provider.v0.

verdict.description: The engine verdict, carried VERBATIM from the baked page — never recomputed by the projection.

verdictLabel.description: The boundary-safe public label for the verdict (VERDICT_PUBLIC_LABEL). Never 'certified/verified safe'.

completeness.description: Evidence completeness of the underlying authority — how much was actually observed.

evidenceLevel.description: The evidence level reached (E0–E6), projected from the shipped preparation pipeline. Never combined with other dimensions into a score.

evidenceRationale.description: Honest one-line rationale for why this evidence level and not higher.

status.description: The four INDEPENDENT status dimensions (ADR 0053 §5), never multiplied or averaged into one rating.

authorityClaimed.description: Namespace control present/absent (control only, NEVER safety).

authority.description: A faithful projection of the calllint.authority.v0 capability inventory — the shipped (action × resource) vocabulary, VERBATIM. Not a new capability taxonomy.

digest.description: The authority manifest's own digest — a consumer can fetch /authority and verify against it.

approvalRequired.description: Normalized approval labels required across all capabilities (sorted, deduped) — verbatim from authority.approval.required.

capabilities.description: The decision-relevant slice of each shipped capability. Shipped vocabulary only; never renamed.

policyDigest.description: The policy digest from the bound decision, if any. Honest null for a static config-only page that carries no decision.

engine.description: The projecting engine. `version` is deliberately omitted from the committed body: a mutable release version would break byte-reproducibility, and it belongs with the (non-deterministic) signature at emit time.

correctionUrl.description: Where a viewer disputes or corrects the projection (ADR 0038 §5).

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Equals the page's pinned observedAt so the committed manifest is byte-reproducible.

signature.description: ed25519 signature attesting WHO emitted the projection (never safety). Null in the byte-reproducible committed body; attached as a separate, non-deterministic step (reuses @calllint/signature).
